protein_name: Recognizes the ribosomal RNA gene promoter and activates transcription mediated by RNA polymerase I through cooperative interactions with the transcription factor SL1/TIF-IB complex. It binds specifically to the upstream control element. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: chromatin binding; DNA binding; protein binding; RNA polymerase I cis-regulatory region sequence-specific DNA binding; RNA polymerase I core promoter sequence-specific DNA binding; RNA polymerase I general transcription initiation factor activity; scaffold protein binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: positive regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase I; regulation of glucose mediated signaling pathway; RNA polymerase I preinitiation complex assembly; transcription by RNA polymerase I; transcription initiation at RNA polymerase I promoter
